title: nanoworld run manifest
description: Written to runs/<id>/manifest.json for every training/data run. Any number the course deck quotes as 'our measurement' must reference one of these.

phase.description: Course build phase that paid for the run

dataset_revision_sha.description: Revision SHA of the dataset consumed (HF revision for HIW-500, git SHA of the recorder for sim data); null for synthetic/self-play data

config_hash.description: sha256 of the resolved run config JSON

config.description: The resolved config itself, for humans

modal_run_id.description: Modal app run id; null for local Mac runs

actual_usd.description: Actual $ from the Modal dashboard; must also land in BUDGET.md

artifacts.description: Every artifact the run produced that anything downstream consumes

exported_browser_files.description: Files copied into the course deck's asset dir by export/to_browser.py

deck_metrics.description: Every number this run contributes to the course deck, keyed by claim id in courses/worldmodels/claims.json

eval_seed_set.description: Named fixed seed set used for reported numbers, e.g. 'arena 0..19', 'eval episodes 0..49'
